description: A baked dish consisting of a yeasted flatbread base topped with sauce, cheese, and other ingredients. It has many regional and global styles ranging from simple Margherita to heavily topped versions.
preparation_steps: Prepare and proof the dough if making it from scratch.
Shape the dough and add sauce, cheese, and toppings.
Bake in a hot oven until the crust is cooked and the topping is set.

nutrition.fat: Moderate to high depending on cheese and toppings

health_advice.benefits: Can provide carbohydrates, protein, and some vegetables depending on toppings.
health_advice.risks: Can be high in sodium, saturated fat, and calories, especially with processed meats and extra cheese.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Choose thinner crusts, more vegetables, and moderate cheese and processed meat.

dietary_notes.note: Vegan and gluten-free versions are widely available when suitable dough and cheese alternatives are used.

serving_info.typical_serving: 2 to 3 slices as a meal portion for many people
